title: tithonia tubaeformis
intro: Tithonia tubaeformis, also known as Mexican sunflower, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tithonia tubaeformis include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, allowing for a range of uses in treating various ailments.
